response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements made during the game's redevelopment. Although we achieved a nearly doubled frame rate through optimization improvements, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid effects and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance considerations. We will work to maintain a balance between these advancements.  
Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can hold in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr.Anya can accommodate 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only take 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of semen depending on their type: a Dreamer typically ejaculates around 10-15ml per climax, while an Elder Thing may deposit 400-600ml into their partner.  
Images #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-programmed in sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on character sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  
Images #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Images #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
